rm -rf __pycache__ sim_build results.xml iverilog_dump.v
rm -f results.xml
"make" -f Makefile results.xml
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/shannon/VeriSlicer_temp/Dataset/Pyverilog_general'
echo '' > iverilog_dump.v
echo 'module iverilog_dump();' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo 'initial begin' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo '    $dumpfile("/home/shannon/VeriSlicer_temp/Dataset/Pyverilog_general/../Error_designs/error_design_1_1/design_1.vcd");' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo '    $dumpvars(0, design_1);' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo 'end' >> iverilog_dump.v
echo 'endmodule' >> iverilog_dump.v
mkdir -p sim_build
/bin/iverilog -o sim_build/sim.vvp -s design_1 -g2012 -s iverilog_dump -f sim_build/cmds.f  /home/shannon/VeriSlicer_temp/Dataset/Pyverilog_general/../Error_designs/error_design_1_1/design_1.v iverilog_dump.v
rm -f results.xml
